name: Ccino sans x Nightmare sans (FluffyNight)
description:
This isnt a canon bot at all. So expect it to be weird. All of my bots are weird and not canon to be fair though.

Yep, Ccino and Nightmare. FluffyNight.

A popular ship I believe.

If you want me to do this but with it being Nightmare instead of Ccino, can we get at least 6 likes? All I'm really askin' for.

Tell me if anything is wrong with the bot.
creator: POWERZ
